#ff0000"},{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：技能冷却减少"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"1","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.8973dfd81638","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text" //cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/960068.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.7b6f0fb6dc999","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【炽热】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你为什么会加入E.O.S.？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"解决完又一次熔断险情，彼安汀忍不住对躺在病床上的炼问出了这个最关心的问题。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「为了理想。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「就这么简单？真的值得吗·····」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炼并没有立即回答，只是默默看起了事故调查报告。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"彼时的伊瑟开始频繁出现熔断现象，E.O.S.不得不吸纳更多的异格者来组建应急小队，专门负责突发的危险。这支临时队伍的称呼有很多——「救火队」、「敢死队」……甚至是「炮灰组」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这次任务的目标原本是一片繁华的商业区，却在源病毒的侵蚀下化为鬼域，感染者与熔断生物如同潮水般源源不绝。E.O.S.虽然配发了针对源病毒的「试剂」，但在那种情形下也只是杯水车薪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炼与彼安汀是小队中最后幸存的异格者，拼尽全力将一位超链者护送到了那个涌出源病毒的裂隙前，成功挽救了濒临破碎的熔断空间。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"队友的牺牲、惨重的伤亡，最终变成调查报告上冰冷的数字，和新闻中寥寥数语的报道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炼看到了报告的结尾，E.O.S.已经决定将临时组建的熔断警察队伍，统合成立一个正式的组织，并命名为「熔断警备署」。这个组织将破天荒地交由异格者来领导，专门处理由源病毒引发的各项灾害。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「当然，一切都是有意义的。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【燃尽】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还记得你为什么加入E.O.S.吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"西弗里的临时基地中，彼安汀把玩着手中的控制器，忽然提起一个看似无关的问题。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「把它放下。我早就说过，为了理想—一这和现在的话题有什么关系？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「既然你当初为了理想，甚至愿意付出自己的生命，那现在，想必更不会阻止这一点必要的牺牲。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你口中必要的牺牲，很可能是成千上万无辜者的性命。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只是执行安全防务署的命令而已。你也很清楚，如果你我不启动灵魂杀手，只会引起高层的关注，派遣其他人来镇，压。你那些无谓的仁慈，并不会拯救他们。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"炼不得不承认彼安汀说的没错，无论是谁站在这个位置上，恐怕都会做出和她一样的选择。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我原本以为你是能与我共进退的伙伴，愿意和我一起想办法解决问题。看来是我错了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「抱歉，我敬重你的理想，但我可没有你这么崇高的品格，这个坏人就让我来当好了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在炼动手抢夺之前，彼安汀就抢先一步按下了控制器。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"灵魂杀手启动时无声无息，然而一切都已尘埃落定。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"遭到背叛的愤怒和挫败感霎时间涌上心头，炼下意识地握住剑柄，但最后的理智让她无法对彼安汀拔出武器。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她们只是注定无法走上同一条道路。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【涅槃】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你怎么会想到离开E.0.S.？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很多人都这样问过炼，新认识的搭档格雷也有这样的好奇。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「……一言难尽，非要说的话，就是因为理想吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这是一个颇为奇怪的答案，但格雷体贴地没有多问。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在炼看来，E.O.S.就像是承载着伊瑟命运的万吨巨轮，无数人的决策、希望、私欲……明里暗里交织在一起，共同推动着这艘巨轮飞速前进着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"谁也不知道它究竟会驶向何方，但炼能确定，那并不是她所期待的方向。更何况，单凭她的力量，绝对无法扭转E.O.S.的风向，因此她只能选择离开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"从熔断警备署到安全防务署，再到退出E.O.S.加入协会，炼的日常其实并没有发生太大的变化，她依然奔波在熔断区之间，护送协会的超链者们去解决一个又一个源病毒的感染源。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只不过这一次，不再有生硬的命令和冰冷的公文，她可以用自己认同的方式来解决难题，也不再需要做出违心的选择。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在协会中，人类与异格者之间并没有分明的壁垒，大家完全依照喜好自由地组建团队，看似纪律松散，却又有着难言的默契，可以放心地交托后背。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协会只是伊瑟微不足道的一角，却也是炼理想世界的缩影。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出，偷条"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 112|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"前期萌新开荒必练角色，由于2技能会分散输出不稳定，中期做完任务可重置此角色。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12洞悉穿刺+8狂怒+6爆裂利刃"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"白撩武者"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_277/50364/842288/2025/7/18/718274.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"8disJjDOff7Rzitq","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
